/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/onset_interfaces/msg/launch_command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/onset_interfaces/msg/onset_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/onset_interfaces/msg/stm32_message__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/onset_interfaces/msg/stm32_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gong/onset_ws/build/onset_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libonset_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
